'''Trax Bonkik''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] who, with his older brother, [[Pax Bonkik|Pax]], was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] to the [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Mars Guo/Legends|Mars Guo]]. Shortly before the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Trax and Guo got into an argument that led to their owner violently beating Trax and planning to sell him after the [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]]. During the event, the Podracer [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] damaged Guo's [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] and later arranged to have Guo's possessions auctioned off.

Fellow Podracer [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]], who had previously befriended Pax, was only able to free Pax, and Trax got sold off to Sebulba. Pax, however, was determined to save his brother and worked for Pagalies, who went on to win the [[Aleen Classic]], with only enough money to be able to free Sebulba's slave [[Ann Gella/Legends|Ann Gella]], whom he had romantic interest in. However, he ended up instead ultimately freeing Trax from Sebulba and reuniting the Rodian siblings.

==Biography==
===Early life and working for Mars Guo===
The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Trax Bonkik had a bond with his older brother, [[Pax Bonkik|Pax]], who hailed from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]],<ref name="db" /> the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of their [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CSWE Rodia">{{CSWECite|III|105|Rodia}}</ref> Their [[Parent/Legends|parents]], being shiftless [[Spice/Legends|spice]] addicts, sold the Bonkik brothers into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="db" />

Trax's older brother looked out for him after they became slaves, with the Rodians drifting from owner to owner, eventually learning skills to increase their worth. Working primarily as [[Technician/Legends|mechanics]], the Bonkik brothers ended up working for a minor league [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]], [[Mars Guo/Legends|Mars Guo]], who would force the siblings to work to near-exhaustion on his [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]], a [[Plug-2 Behemoth|Plug-2 ''Behemoth'']].<ref name="db" />

===Boonta Eve Classic and eventual freedom===
[[File:Pax_and_Trax_Bonkik_TPM.png|thumb|300px|Pax and Trax Bonkik worked as mechanics for Mars Guo prior to and during 32 BBY's Boonta Eve Classic.]]
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], which include the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] shown in the film, to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> Guo intended to compete in the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="rr">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''</ref> Trax and Guo had a heated argument shortly before the [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]]. Trax's master subsequently beat him and claimed he would sell him off following the race.<ref name="db" />

Pax, who hoped not to be separated from his younger brother, contacted Podracer [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]], who he had previously befriended and was also participating in the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|race]]; Pagalies agreed to help Pax, not wanting the brothers to be split.<ref name="db" /> Guo's Podracer was destroyed by fellow Podracer [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] during the competition,<ref name="The Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref> and although Trax and Pax could have been potentially free of their obnoxious owner, Sebulba instead arranged to have Guo's possessions auctioned while Guo was recovering from his crash.<ref name="db" /> Since Pagalies had also lost his Podracer during the race,<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> he was only able to afford to buy Pax at the auction, with Trax becoming Sebulba's property.<ref name="db" />

Pax was determined to free his brother and decided to stay on with Pagalies and serve as his mechanic even when freed. Pax and Pagalies traveled to the racing circuit searching for Sebulba or Trax. With Pagalies later winning the [[Aleen Classic]], he only could afford to free [[Ann Gella/Legends|Ann Gella]], a slave of Sebulba's who he had romantic interest in. However, he instead purchased Trax, freeing him and reuniting the brothers. The siblings would never again be apart.<ref name="db" />

==Personality and traits==
Trax Bonkik had a close bond with Pax. As a result of his impulses, the heated argument he got into with Mars Guo led to the latter violently beating him.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2005]],<ref name="winners">{{SWArchive|url=databank/updates/news20050930.html|text=Hyperspace Presents: What's The Story, Round 2}}</ref> Trax Bonkik was created by [[javajawas]], who wrote the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for his brother as part of the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature "[[What's The Story?]]"<ref name="db" /> While Pax Bonkik appears with another Rodian mechanic in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']],<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> no official ''[[Star Wars]]'' media has identified the other mechanic as Trax.
